postReview.title: Leeds United 3-1 Burnley: Farke's men stride closer to safety
postReview.description: Leeds United took a huge step towards confirming their safety in the Premier League with a 3-1 victory over Burnley at Elland Road.

postReview.title: Leeds United 3-1 Burnley: los de Farke se acercan a la permanencia
postReview.description: El Leeds United dio un paso de gigante hacia la permanencia en la Premier League con su victoria por 3-1 ante el Burnley en Elland Road.

postReview.title: Leeds United-Burnley 3-1: la squadra di Farke a un passo dalla salvezza
postReview.description: Leeds United a un passo dalla salvezza in Premier League: Burnley battuto 3-1 a Elland Road

postReview.title: Leeds United 3-1 Burnley: time de Farke dá passo importante rumo à permanência
postReview.description: O Leeds United deu um grande passo para confirmar a permanência na Premier League ao vencer o Burnley por 3 a 1 em Elland Road.

postReview.title: Leeds United 3-1 Burnley : les hommes de Farke se rapprochent du maintien
postReview.description: Leeds United a fait un grand pas vers le maintien en Premier League grâce à sa victoire 3-1 contre Burnley à Elland Road.

postReview.title: Leeds United 3:1 Burnley: Farkes Team marschiert Richtung Klassenerhalt
postReview.description: Leeds United machte mit dem 3:1-Heimsieg gegen Burnley im Elland Road einen großen Schritt Richtung Klassenerhalt in der Premier League.

postReview.title: ليدز يونايتد 3-1 بيرنلي: رجال فاركه يقتربون خطوة كبيرة من البقاء
postReview.description: قطع ليدز يونايتد خطوة كبيرة نحو ضمان البقاء في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز بعدما فاز على بيرنلي 3-1 في إيلاند رود.

postReview.title: Leeds United 3-1 Burnley: equipa de Farke fica mais perto da permanência
postReview.description: Leeds United dá passo gigante rumo à permanência ao bater Burnley por 3-1 em Elland Road

preReview.title: Ampadu: Leeds will take lessons from FA Cup exit into Premier League relegation battle
preReview.description: Leeds United could take another step towards retaining their Premier League status when they host relegated Burnley on Friday.

preReview.title: Ampadu: Leeds sacará lecciones de la eliminación en la FA Cup para la pelea por evitar el descenso en la Premier League
preReview.description: El Leeds United podría dar otro paso hacia la permanencia en la Premier League cuando reciba el viernes al Burnley, ya descendido.

preReview.title: Ampadu: il Leeds farà tesoro dell'eliminazione in FA Cup nella lotta salvezza in Premier League
preReview.description: Il Leeds United può fare un altro passo verso la permanenza in Premier League venerdì, quando ospiterà il Burnley, già retrocesso.

preReview.title: Ampadu: Leeds vai tirar lições da eliminação na Copa da Inglaterra para a luta contra o rebaixamento na Premier League
preReview.description: O Leeds United pode dar mais um passo para se manter na Premier League ao receber o já rebaixado Burnley na sexta-feira.

preReview.title: Ampadu : Leeds va tirer les leçons de son élimination en FA Cup pour sa lutte pour le maintien en Premier League
preReview.description: Leeds United pourrait se rapprocher un peu plus du maintien en Premier League en recevant Burnley, déjà relégué, vendredi.

preReview.title: Ampadu: Leeds nimmt Lehren aus dem FA-Cup-Aus mit in den Premier-League-Abstiegskampf
preReview.description: Leeds United kann am Freitag im Heimspiel gegen den bereits abgestiegenen FC Burnley den nächsten Schritt Richtung Klassenerhalt in der Premier League machen.

preReview.title: أمبادو: ليدز سيستفيد من دروس الخروج من كأس إنجلترا في صراع البقاء بالدوري الممتاز
preReview.description: قد يقترب ليدز يونايتد خطوة جديدة من ضمان البقاء في الدوري الممتاز عندما يستضيف بيرنلي الهابط يوم الجمعة.

preReview.title: Ampadu: Leeds vai tirar lições da eliminação na Taça de Inglaterra para a luta pela permanência na Premier League
preReview.description: O Leeds United pode dar mais um passo rumo à permanência na Premier League, esta sexta-feira, ao receber o despromovido Burnley.

QAData.question: Who won between Leeds United and Burnley on Fri, 01 May 2026 19:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Leeds United won 3–1 over Burnley on Fri, 01 May 2026 19:00:00 GMT.
